'''chachutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcheese|headcheese]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcheese|headcheese]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chachutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæchitith|chæchitith]] || [[word:chæchitij|chæchitij]] || [[word:chæchitish|chæchitish]] || [[word:chæchiti|chæchiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachuchututh|chachuchututh]] || [[word:chachuchutuj|chachuchutuj]] || [[word:chachuchutush|chachuchutush]] || [[word:chachuchutu|chachuchutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachututh|chachututh]] || [[word:chachutuj|chachutuj]] || [[word:chachutush|chachutush]] || [[word:chachutu|chachutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachuftufth|chachuftufth]] || [[word:chachuftufj|chachuftufj]] || [[word:chachuftufsh|chachuftufsh]] || [[word:chachuftuf|chachuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chachututhu|chachututhu]] || [[word:chachutuju|chachutuju]] || [[word:chachutushu|chachutushu]] || [[word:chachutuku|chachutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chachututh|chachututh]] || [[word:chachutuj|chachutuj]] || [[word:chachutush|chachutush]] || [[word:chachutu|chachutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chachututhul|chachututhul]] || [[word:chachutujul|chachutujul]] || [[word:chachutushul|chachutushul]] || [[word:chachutukul|chachutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chachutuuthuthu|chachutuuthuthu]] || [[word:chachutuujuju|chachutuujuju]] || [[word:chachutuushushu|chachutuushushu]] || [[word:chachutuuku|chachutuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chachututhun|chachututhun]] || [[word:chachutujun|chachutujun]] || [[word:chachutushun|chachutushun]] || [[word:chachutukun|chachutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chachututhuoro|chachututhuoro]] || [[word:chachutujuoro|chachutujuoro]] || [[word:chachutushuoro|chachutushuoro]] || [[word:chachutukuoro|chachutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a890715}}
